articles.title: Celsius Network Reportedly Lays Off 25% of its Workforce
articles.description: Summary: Celsius Network has reportedly laid off 150 staff members who constitute 25% of its workforce. The team behind the lending platform had last month hired restructuring advisors. Celsius Network has also put forward three proposals for rebuilding through Bnk to The Future Capital: a restructuring to launch Celsius, a pool of most influential whales in Bitcoin to co-invest with the...

articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Looks To Recover After Sliding To $0.43 – Pressure’s On For The Bulls
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) price experienced a protracted run along a falling angle formed on June 27, when the price was $0.52. Since then, ADA has retreated gradually to find support at $0.44. Nonetheless, ADA may be slowly returning to the green zone, as its price increased throughout the weekend’s session after plummeting to a low of $0.43 on Friday. articles.title: Blast From the Past: Napster Launching Own Token ($NAPSTER) on Algorand ($ALGO)
articles.description: Music streaming service Napster is launching a token on the Algorand network in a bid to move towards Web3 integration.
